chapter_title.ar: باب الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَ الطَّعَامِ وَ بَعْدَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – The ablution before the meal and after it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/102)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/102)
text: مَنْ غَسَلَ يَدَهُ قَبْلَ الطَّعَامِ وَ بَعْدَهُ عَاشَ فِي سَعَةٍ وَ عُوفِيَ مِنْ بَلْوَى فِي جَسَدِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin ZIyad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Ibn Al Qaddah,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The one who washes his hands before the meal and after it would live in ease, and would be excused from the affliction in his body’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ja‘far ibn Muhammad al-Ash‘ariy from ibn al-Qaddah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One who washes his hand before and after food, lives a rich life and remains safe from troubles in his body.”’
